title: Authorization bypass via spoofed x-request-from header in API middleware
description: The global authentication middleware for /api/v1 routes in index.ts short-circuits on req.headers['x-request-from'] === 'internal', calling only verifyToken() instead of validateAPIKey(). Any authenticated tenant with a UI session cookie can add this header to bypass API key authorization checks, gaining access to internal administration endpoints including API key management, credential stores, and custom function execution.
